challenge_summary: Pass-8 terminal hash refresh reaffirms the approved pass-7 governance reconciliation. Since pass 7, the only tracked byte changes are final LF additions to infra/bicep/vnext-qualification/bootstrap.bicep and agent-output/vnext-qualification/challenge-findings-governance-constraints-pass3.json; git diff --ignore-space-at-eol is clean for both files and both now end in 0a. The generated untracked infra/bicep/vnext-qualification/main.json remains absent. The challenged governance artifact and required challenger inputs retain the same hashes as pass 7, so semantic content, prior security and governance conclusions, and the low-risk zero-finding approval are unchanged. Live cloud execution, including Azure Policy evaluation during deploy, GitHub approval/OIDC/RBAC, apply, destroy, and authority-return behavior, remains residual risk because no cloud mutation or execution was performed in this review-only pass.
compact_for_parent: Pass 8 (governance-reconciliation) | LOW | 0 must_fix, 0 should_fix | Pass 7 reaffirmed; LF-only refresh
